feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Exceptionally 5/10
entry.content: The most mid movie I have ever seen. Acting, set design, etc was all pretty good. The lack of story other than "black guy marriage issues" kills it. I even know about all Kane's background Youtube lore blah blah blah and I was still waiting the whole time for something truly interesting to happen. Is there some shit I'm missing or was this just reddit slop that I wasted time for? I am actively hoping that I am just retarded and missed out on some incredible secret shit that only true film connoi

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: London Walking video
entry.content: We're having some really hot weather in the UK at the moment, so naturally large amounts of people are still standing in queues in the blazing sunshine. Here's an hour long+ video taken last Friday walking through the streets of London. Let's see what wonders you can find, of any kind, but no racism or sexism please. (include timestamps for really interesting events) Also, there's 3 logos put in there by the guy who makes the videos, let me know if you can spot them because I'll be buggered if I

entry.content: Cumming from the ass is just like cumming from jerking off. With all the hassle, I don't think I'm doing it again. The internet always say "oh it feels so good" "oh it feels so different from cumming from penile stimulation" "oh my whole body quivers and I think I got a whole new obsession" No bro, you just cum. That's it. Why would I think it would be any different, cum is cum. When you cum your pelvic floor contracts, and you feel good when you cum, because of the chemicals released or smt. WH

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Who the fuck bullies someone this beautiful looking? Some fat smelly ugly jealou…

I seriously never ever understood the mentality behind bullying physically endowed and traditionally attractive people, especially when they come across as polite as she does. Like you're just setting yourself up to be hated by anyone who's normal.

entry.title: /b/ Random: HOW DO I SAVE MYSELF FROM BEING A SOCIOPATHIC GOONER?
entry.content: I'm a 27 yo male above average looks, so I never rlly struggled with being totaly friendless or single even now I have people in my life that expressed interest in being my friends. the problem is that I cant stand being in the presence of other people, faking being sociable and spending time with others is so draining, after one evening doing some sort of social activity where I must interact with multiple people I get so burn out the muslcles of my face get sore from fake smiling and laughing

entry.content: I went to the beach and got absolutely mogged by beautiful girls. I wish I wasn't flat and ugly and man bulit.. I'm afab yet look like a fucking troon, this is a fate worse than anyones. I also seemed like a sexual predator which pretty much sucked, well I am a pervert anyway so I guess that counts.. entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why white people like that?
entry.content: Why is it that, when it comes to resisting the system, white people tend to commit one-time terrorist attacks instead of creating large, cell-based syndicates that take small steps in what they see as the right direction while uniting everyone in the process? Every Islamic terrorist group using this method to organize Gaza protests in europe and makes sure Palestinian flags are well maintained in every EU city. And we have nothing to counter that. Everyone is aware that a battle is happening, bu

entry.title: /b/ Random: Do rich people not understand that we have to have incentives to want to work ha…
entry.content: Do rich people not understand that we have to have incentives to want to work hard? Like money is good but people need a reason also, like a wife and family, perhaps a society that is worth contributing to. As is we live in nigger mania and everything costs a million dollars and all the women are whores. No reason to slave for such a shit society that we got no stake in. Let it all burn. Sorry for incel rant

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Let's have a Zelda lore thread /v/. Beamos are actually kind of horrifying. They…
entry.content: Let's have a Zelda lore thread /v/. Beamos are actually kind of horrifying. They have lips, noses, teeth and atrophied legs. If they're Sheikah-related, it means they had biotech knowledge, likely experimented on Hylians and engineered them into bio-mechanical abominations.

entry.title: /news/ News: Republicans devastated as SCOTUS rules in favor of fair elections
entry.content: https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jun/29/supreme-court-mail-in- ballots-election-ruling US supreme court upholds law to count mail-in ballots arriving after election day Court sides against Republicans after deciding earlier this term to let Louisiana effectively dismantle Voting Rights Act The US supreme court sided against national Republicans and Donald Trump’s administration to allow mail-in ballots that arrive after election day to be counted, upholding the law in more than a dozen
